prompt: Which canonical name should the unified exclusion key use (aliases accepted regardless)?
choices: exclude_files (matches what is already deployed in real CHECKS.yaml)
Support both as first-class, document exclude

prompt: Global excludes should accumulate (union) down the CHECKS hierarchy, so a child can only ADD excludes and never narrow a parent's. Adopt union for v1?

Include the finding-location post-filter backstop in v1 (drop any finding located on an excluded path, in addition to selection-time subtraction), to make the no-findings guarantee uniform across all check kinds?
Once framework excludes land, delete the flunge .prettierignore stopgap (T113) entirely? (No = retain it solely for developers invoking oxfmt/prettier directly outside checkleft.)
